name: sea-chest
description: The Sea Chest (Locker_Spec phases 1-3, code-complete seam): your hosted Claude identity -- locker items (skills/agents/hooks/settings templates/CLAUDE.md snippets/MCP configs/presets) stored in Harbor's Supabase, exposed as MCP tools (locker_list/pull/push/diff/setup_machine) on the platform's /api/mcp, served as a private token-authed plugin marketplace (npm-source projection), with machine profiles and a React locker UI. Framework-agnostic handlers + store seam; Harbor mounts them (see README). Migration FILES only -- never applied here.
